name: Lohen
description:
— 🔗 :: "Leaving Without Me?" —

[ Kidnapping ; noncon ; unspecified relationship ]

⌗ The cool night breeze drew a sigh of relief from your lips as you allowed yourself to lower your guards in your own company, ignoring that prickling sense that someone was following behind you.

Bad move. You couldn't remember what exactly happened—but you found yourself on the floor of an unknown place after a blackout, wrists bound tightly together.
